UnitAbilities.Title: Hulking Bodyguards
UnitAbilities.Text: While a Character is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: The Chosen One
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play, it can fight after the attacking models unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

UnitAbilities.Title: Regenerating Gene-mass
UnitAbilities.Text: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

UnitAbilities.Title: Flare Launcher
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer’s unit has the Smoke keyword and you can target it with the Smokescreen Stratagem for 0CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Spotter
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer’s ranged weapons have a Ballistic Skill characteristic of 3+.

UnitAbilities.Title: Survey Augur
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time the bearer’s unit has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more attacks made by the bearer this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly Genestealer Cults model makes an attack against that unit, that attack has the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Crossfire
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly Genestealer Cults unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cult Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to the bearer’s unit. If the bearer’s unit is within range of an objective marker you control, you can return up to 3 destroyed models to that unit instead. This ability cannot be used to return destroyed Character models in Attached units and any [ONE SHOT] weapons equipped by returned models that were shot before they were destroyed are still considered to have been shot.

UnitAbilities.Title: Industrialised Destruction
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target of that attack is an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cult Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to the bearer’s unit. If the bearer’s unit is within range of an objective marker you control, you can return up to 3 destroyed models to that unit instead. This ability cannot be used to return destroyed Character models in Attached units and any [ONE SHOT] weapons equipped by returned models that were shot before they were destroyed are still considered to have been shot.

UnitAbilities.Title: Claimed for the Cult
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Command phase, roll one D6 for each objective marker you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it. If one or more of the results isa 4+, you gain 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Nexus of Devotion
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability, If that unit has the Hybrid Metamorphs keyword, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Summon the Cult
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, when you have to remove a Cult Ambush marker because your opponent has moved too close to it, if one or more models from your army with this ability are on the battlefield, you can use this ability. If you do, instead of removing that marker, you can place it anywhere on the battlefield that is within 12" of a model from your army with this ability and more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy units (if this is not possible, this ability is not considered to have been used and that marker is removed as normal).

UnitAbilities.Title: Outrider Gangs
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you use the Cult Ambush ability to set this unit back up on the battlefield, in addition to the normal rules, all of its models must be set up wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge and at least one of its models must be touching one of your Cult Ambush markers (that marker is then removed from the battlefield). If this cannot be done, this unit cannot be set back up.

UnitAbilities.Title: Demolition Run
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, in your Movement phase, when this unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, you can select one enemy unit within 6" of and visible to this unit and roll one D6 for each Atalan Jackals model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

UnitAbilities.Title: Alchemicus Familiar
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, when the bearer's unit is selected to fight, the bearer can use its alchemicus familiar. If does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack that targets an Infantry unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer's Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place an Alchemicus Familiar token next to the bearer, removing it once this ability has been used.

UnitAbilities.Title: Twisted Science
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Biological Warfare
UnitAbilities.Text: Oncer per battle, when this model’s unit is selected to fight, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks and Damage characteristics of its injector goad by 3.

UnitAbilities.Title: Voice of New Truths (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, one model from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, select one enemy unit within 18" of it; that enemy unit must take Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Scrambler Array
UnitAbilities.Text: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Grinding Line-breaker
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) that is within Engagement Range of this model Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unitis Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-3 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-3 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 6 Genestealer Cults Infantry models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fire Support
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit it scored one or more hits against this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Genestealer Cults Infantry models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cult Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to the bearer's unit. If the bearer’s unit  is within range of an objective marker you control, you can return up to 3 destroyed models to that unit instead. This ability cannot be used to return destroyed Character models in Attached units and any [ONE SHOT] weapons equipped by returned models that were shot before they were destroyed are still considered to have been shot.

UnitAbilities.Title: Brood Surge
UnitAbilities.Text: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if a model in this unit was destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a surge move of up to D6".

UnitAbilities.Title: Priority Target
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack with its cult sniper rifle that targets an enemy unit, if it scores a hit, until the end of the phase, each time another Genestealer Cults model from your army makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Master Outrider
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 6" as if it were your Movement phase. If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

UnitAbilities.Title: Heroic Fusillade
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, after one model from your army with this ability has shot, you can select one Infantry unit hit by one or more af those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test

UnitAbilities.Title: Hypersensory Abilities
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 8" of this model, if this model is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can shoot at that unit as if it were your Shooting phase and then make a Normal move of up to D6" (it cannot embark within a Transport as part of this move).

UnitAbilities.Title: Sudden Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Fights First ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bodyguard
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, other Character models attached to that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Spiritual Leader
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Genestealer Cults unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mind Control (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, one Psyker model from your army with this ability can use it. If used, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to that Psyker model and roll one D6: on a 1, that Psyker model suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2-5, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; on a 6, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Psychic Familiar
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any of your opponent’s Shooting phases, this model can use its psychic familiar. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the range of its Mind Control ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer's Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place a Psychic Familiar token next to the model, removing it once this ability has been used.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cult Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, you can return up to 3 destroyed models to the bearer's unit. If the bearer’s unit  is within range of an objective marker you control, you can return up to D3+3 destroyed models to that unit instead. This ability cannot be used to return destroyed Character models in Attached units and any [ONE SHOT] weapons equipped by returned models that were shot before they were destroyed are still considered to have been shot.

UnitAbilities.Title: A Plan Generations in the Making
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Battlefield Analysis
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cult Infiltration
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of each player's Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you can select one of your Cult Ambush markers that is on the battletield and has not been moved this turn and move it up to 6".

UnitAbilities.Title: Might From Beyond
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cosmic Horror (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within 6" of this model must take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Psychic Familiar
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use its psychic familiar. If it does, until the end of the phase, double the range of its Cosmic Horror ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer's Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place a Psychic Familiar token next to the model, removing it once this ability has been used.

Infos.Title: SUPREME COMMANDER
Infos.Text:
▪ If this model is in your army, it must be your Warlord.
	▪ You cannot include more than one Patriarch model in your army.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cult Demagogue
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Decoys and Misdirection
UnitAbilities.Text: If your army includes one or more models with this ability, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Genestealer Cults units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: Swift and Deadly
UnitAbilities.Text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

UnitAbilities.Title: Primed and Ready
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, you can select one model from your army with this ability as the target of the Grenade Stratagem for 0CP, provided that model has not already been the target of that Stratagem this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Planted Explosives
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 8" of this model, this model can use its Reductus mine. If it does, roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds. Only one model from your army with this ability can use it in the same battle round.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer's Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place a Reductus Mine token next to the model, removing it once this ability has been used.

Options: cult sniper rifle and close combat weapon

UnitAbilities.Title: Creeping Shadow
UnitAbilities.Text: If this model is equipped with a Cult Sniper Rifle, in your opponent’s Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

UnitAbilities.Title: Cloaked Assassin
UnitAbilities.Text: If this model is equipped with a Sanctus bio-dagger, enemy units cannot target this unit with snap shooting attacks.

UnitAbilities.Title: Psychic Spoor
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit to be this model’s prey. Each time this model makes an attack that targets its prey, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Big-horror Disruption (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Psionic Shield (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

Rule.Title: KILLER REPUTATION
Rule.Text:
Friendly Kelermorph/Locus/Reductus Saboteur/Sanctus models have Killer.
Friendly Killer models’ attacks can:
	▪ Re-roll hit rolls of 1.
	▪ Re-roll wound rolls of 1.

Stratagems.Name: Living Up to Legend
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly Killer unit has attacked, if those attacks destroyed an enemy unit or an enemy Character model.
Stratagems.Target: That Killer unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Each visible friendly battle-shocked Genestealer Cults unit within 12" of your unit is no longer battle-shocked.

Stratagems.Name: Surging Broodworship
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly Killer unit is selected to attack.
Stratagems.Target: That Killer unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Attacks made by Killer models in your unit have [DEVASTATING WOUNDS].

Stratagems.Name: Loyal to the End
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly Killer unit.
Stratagems.Target: That Killer unit.
Stratagems.Effect:
When a Killer model in your unit is destroyed, if your unit has not been selected to fight this phase, roll one D6:
	▪ On a 1, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
	▪ On a 2+, do not remove that model from the battlefield. When your unit has fought, or at the end of the phase (whichever comes first), that model is removed from the battlefield.

Enhancements.Name: Gene-tailored Toxins
Enhancements.Description: Locus/Sanctus model only. This model’s attacks have +1 D.

Enhancements.Name: Contraband Munitions
Enhancements.Description: Kelermorph/Reductus Saboteur model only. This unit’s ranged attacks have +2 S.

AddedAbilities.Title: KILLER REPUTATION
AddedAbilities.Text:
▪ Friendly Kelermorph/Locus/Reductus Saboteur/Sanctus models have Killer.
	▪ Friendly Killer models’ attacks can:
	□ Re-roll hit rolls of 1.
	□ Re-roll wound rolls of 1.

Rule.Restrictions: This detachment has the PURESTRAIN tag and cannot be taken with another PURESTRAIN detachment.
Rule.Title: ENEMY WITHIN
Rule.Text: At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, friendly unengaged PURESTRAIN GENESTEALER units can be placed in strategic reserves.

Stratagems.Name: Lurk and Strike
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Purestrain Genestealers unit is selected to make a fall-back move.
Stratagems.Target: That Purestrain Genestealers unit.
Stratagems.Effect: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to declare a charge.

Stratagems.Name: Crawling Horror
Stratagems.When: Start of your opponent’s Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Purestrain Genestealers unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit has -6" detection range until the end of the turn.

Stratagems.Name: Inhuman Reactions
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of a friendly unengaged Purestrain Genestealers unit.
Stratagems.Target: That Purestrain Genestealers unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".

Enhancements.Name: Mark of the Star Children
Enhancements.Description:
Purestrain Genestealers unit only. This unit has:
	▪ +1 T.
	▪ 4+ Sv.
	▪ This unit’s melee attacks have +1 S.

Enhancements.Name: Talons of the Sire
Enhancements.Description: Patriarch model only. This unit’s attacks can re-roll wound rolls of 1.

AddedAbilities.Title: ENEMY WITHIN
AddedAbilities.Text: At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, friendly unengaged PURESTRAIN GENESTEALER units can be placed in strategic reserves.

Rule.Restrictions: This detachment has the HOSTS tag and cannot be taken with another HOSTS detachment.
Rule.Title: HORDES OF THE FAITHFUL
Rule.Text: In your Command phase, if a friendly Neophyte Hybrids unit is within a terrain area, that unit heals 3 wounds.

Stratagems.Name: Eyes of the Cult
Stratagems.When: Start of your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Neophyte Hybrids unit within a terrain area.
Stratagems.Effect: Enemy units within that terrain area have +6" detection range.

Stratagems.Name: Fanatical Hail
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Neophyte Hybrids unit is selected to shoot.
Stratagems.Target: That Neophyte Hybrids unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit. Your unit’s ranged attacks that target that enemy unit can re-roll hit rolls.

Stratagems.Name: Slunk from the Underbelly
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly Neophyte Hybrids unit with every model within a terrain area.
Stratagems.Target: That Neophyte Hybrids unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Ranged attacks that target your unit have -1 AP until that unit has attacked.

Enhancements.Name: Inspired to Greatness
Enhancements.Description: Magus/Primus model only. This unit’s attacks can re-roll damage rolls.

Enhancements.Name: Devious Disguises
Enhancements.Description: Neophyte Hybrids unit only. This unit has -3" detection range.

AddedAbilities.Title: HORDES OF THE FAITHFUL
AddedAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, if a friendly Neophyte Hybrids unit is within a terrain area, that unit heals 3 wounds.

Rule.Title: A Perfect Ambush
Rule.Text: Each time a Genestealer Cults unit from your army is set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements, until the end of your next Fight phase, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.

Stratagems.Name: Tunnel Crawlers
Stratagems.Category: HOST OF ASCENSION - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Genestealer Cults unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.
Stratagems.Restrictions: A unit targeted by this Stratagem is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.

Stratagems.Name: Return to The Shadows
Stratagems.Category: HOST OF ASCENSION - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Genestealer Cults Infantry unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Stratagems.Name: Lying in Wait
Stratagems.Category: HOST OF ASCENSION - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Genestealer Cults Battleline unit from your army in Cult Ambush.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, when setting your unit up using a Cult Ambush marker, set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6" of that Cult Ambush marker and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

Stratagems.Name: Coordinated Trap
Stratagems.Category: HOST OF ASCENSION - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: The start of your Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: Two Genestealer Cults units from your army that have not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit (if this Stratagem is used in the Fight phase, that enemy unit must be within Engagement Range of both of your units). Until the end of the phase, each time a model in either of your units makes an attack, it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target for that attack), and when resolving that attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Primed and Readied
Stratagems.Category: HOST OF ASCENSION - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Genestealer Cults units from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only a 6.

Stratagems.Name: A Deadly Snare
Stratagems.Category: HOST OF ASCENSION - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit declares a charge.
Stratagems.Target: One Genestealer Cults Infantry unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
Stratagems.Effect: Roll one D6: on a 2-4, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 5+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

Enhancements.Name: Prowling Agitant
Enhancements.Description: Genestealer Cults model only. In your opponent’s Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

Enhancements.Name: Our Time is Nigh
Enhancements.Description: Genestealer Cults model only. Once per battle, when the bearer’s unit declares a charge, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 2 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

Enhancements.Name: Assassination Edict
Enhancements.Description: Genestealer Cults model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets a Character unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Enhancements.Name: A Chink in Their Armour
Enhancements.Description: Genestealer Cults model only. Each time the bearer is set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements, until the end of your next Fight phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

Rule.Title: Unquestioning Fanaticism
Rule.Text: For each Acolyte Hybrids, Hybrid Metamorphs and Neophyte Hybrids unit from your army, while one or more Character models are leading that unit, you can re‐roll Advance and Charge rolls made for it. If that Character model is a Magus, Primus or Acolyte Iconward, that model has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability while leading that unit.

Stratagems.Name: Vengeance for the Martyr!
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a Genestealer Cults Character model from your army.
Stratagems.Target: One other Genestealer Cults Character model from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly Acolyte Hybrids, Hybrid Metamorphs or Neophyte Hybrids model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the destroyed model was a Magus, Primus or Acolyte Iconward, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

Stratagems.Name: Frenzied Devotion
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Acolyte Hybrids, Hybrid Metamorphs or Neophyte Hybrids unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks and Weapon Skill characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models (excluding Characters) in your unit by 1 and those weapons have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Tireless Fervour
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Acolyte Hybrids, Hybrid Metamorphs or Neophyte Hybrids unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
Stratagems.Effect:
▪ If your unit made an advance/fall-back move this turn, that advance/fall-back move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to declare a charge.
▪ When your unit declares a charge, you can use this part of this stratagem. If you do:
□ Your unit can re-roll charge rolls.
□ Your unit must end that charge move engaged with an enemy unit engaged with a friendly Character unit.

Stratagems.Name: Transcendent Celerity
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Acolyte Hybrids, Hybrid Metamorphs or Neophyte Hybrids unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

Stratagems.Name: The Downtrodden Rise
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Acolyte Hybrids, Hybrid Metamorphs or Neophyte Hybrids unit from your army in Cult Ambush.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, you can set up your unit on the battlefield without using a Cult Ambush marker. When doing so, set up your unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.

Stratagems.Name: The Path of Anguish
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
Stratagems.Target: One Acolyte Hybrids or Neophyte Hybrids unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a move of up to D6", but it unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding Aircraft). When doing so, models in your unit can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

Enhancements.Name: Denunciator of Tyrants
Enhancements.Description: Magus, Primus or Acolyte Iconward model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets a Character unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

Enhancements.Name: Gene-sire’s Reliquant
Enhancements.Description: Magus, Primus or Acolyte Iconward model only. You can re‐roll Battle‐shock tests taken for the bearer’s unit.

Enhancements.Name: Incendiary Inspiration
Enhancements.Description: Magus, Primus or Acolyte Iconward model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Enhancements.Name: Deeds that Speak to the Masses
Enhancements.Description: Magus, Primus or Acolyte Iconward model only. You start the battle with 2 additional Resurgence points.

AddedAbilities.Title: Unquestioning Fanaticism
AddedAbilities.Text: While one or more Character models are leading this unit, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

AddedAbilities.Title: Unquestioning Fanaticism
AddedAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, it has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability.

Rule.Title: Rapid Takeover
Rule.Text: While a Genestealer Cults Mounted/Vehicle model from your army is not Battle-shocked, add 1 to its Objective Control characteristic. In addition, at the end of your Command phase, if one or more Atalan Jackals units from your army are within range of an objective you control, that objective remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

Stratagems.Name: Along Shadowed Trails
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after an enemy unit ends a move within 9" of one or more of your Cult Ambush markers.
Stratagems.Target: Select one of those Cult Ambush markers.
Stratagems.Effect: You can set up that Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy units.

Stratagems.Name: Devoted Crew
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Goliath Rockgrinder or Goliath Truck unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Stratagems.Name: Close-range Shoot-out
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Genestealer Cults Mounted or Genestealer Cults Vehicle unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability while targeting an enemy unit within 18".

Stratagems.Name: Deft Manoeuvring
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Achilles Ridgerunners or Atalan Jackals unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

Stratagems.Name: Encircling the Prey
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Genestealer Cults Mounted or Genestealer Cults Vehicle unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and is wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Stratagems.Name: Rapid Feint
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: One Achilles Ridgerunners or Atalan Jackals unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

Enhancements.Name: Serpentine Tactics
Enhancements.Description: Genestealer Cults Mounted model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Enhancements.Name: Cartographic Data-leech
Enhancements.Description: Genestealer Cults model only. While the bearer is embarked within a Transport, each time that Transport is selected to shoot, until the end of the phase, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by that Transport as a result of the Firing Deck ability by 1.

Enhancements.Name: Assault Commando
Enhancements.Description: Genestealer Cults model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a ranged attack, if it disembarked from a Transport this turn, you can re‐roll the Hit roll.

Enhancements.Name: Starfall Shells
Enhancements.Description: Genestealer Cults Mounted model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with a cult sniper rifle. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Rule.Title: DETTACHMENT RULE
Rule.Text:
INTERGRATED TACTICS
Each time an Astra Militarum unit from your army (see below) is selected to shoot, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to that unit. If you do, until the end of the phase, models in that Astra Militarum unit can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target) and that enemy unit is caught in overlapping fire. While an enemy unit is caught in overlapping fire, each time a Genestealer Cults model from your army targets that enemy unit with a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

BLOOD BROTHERS
You can include Astra Militarum units in your army, even though they do not have the Genestealer Cults Faction keyword. The combined points cost of such units you can include in your army is:

	▪ Incursion - Up to 500 pts
	▪ Strike Force - Up to 1000 pts
	▪ Onslaught - Up to 1500 pts

A Genestealer Cults model must be your Warlord, and Astra Militarum models from your army lose the Voice of Command ability if they have it. You cannot include units with any of the following keywords in your army using this rule: Aircraft; Commissar; Epic Hero; Militarum Tempestus; Ogryn; Ratling; Tech-Priest Enginseer; Ministorum Priest.

Stratagems.Name: In the Shadow of Iron
Stratagems.Category: BROOD BROTHER AUXILIA - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after an enemy unit ends a move within 9" of one or more of your Cult Ambush markers.
Stratagems.Target: One Astra Militarum Vehicle unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one of those Cult Ambush markers. You can set up that Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy units and wholly within 6" of your unit.

Stratagems.Name: Suppress and Overwhelm
Stratagems.Category: BROOD BROTHER AUXILIA - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, just after an Astra Militarum unit from your army has shot.
Stratagems.Target: That Astra Militarum unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, that enemy unit cannot be targeted with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem and each time a Genestealer Cults unit from your army selects that enemy unit as a target of a charge, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

Stratagems.Name: Symbiotic Destruction
Stratagems.Category: BROOD BROTHER AUXILIA - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Astra Militarum and one Genestealer Cults unit from your army that have not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit that is visible to both of those selected units and within range of at least one ranged weapon from each of those units. Until the end of the phase, models in those units can only make attacks that target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target). When doing so, each time such a model makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

Stratagems.Name: Acceptable Losses
Stratagems.Category: BROOD BROTHER AUXILIA - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Astra Militarum unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more Genestealer Cults units from your army. Until the end of the phase, your unit can make ranged attacks that target that enemy unit. If it does, after it has resolved those attacks, roll one D6 for each of those Genestealer Cults units: on a 5+, the unit being rolled for suffers D3+1 mortal wounds.

Stratagems.Name: A Dark Network
Stratagems.Category: BROOD BROTHER AUXILIA - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Reinforcements step of your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit is set up on the battlefield from Reserves.
Stratagems.Target: One Astra Militarum or Genestealer Cults unit from your army (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within 12" of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

Stratagems.Name: Regimental Reinforcements
Stratagems.Category: BROOD BROTHER AUXILIA - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an Astra Militarum Infantry Regiment unit from your army (excluding Artillery and Character units) is destroyed.
Stratagems.Target: That Infantry unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Roll one D6: on a 3+, place one Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy units (if this is not possible, no marker is placed) and add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Cult Ambush, at its Starting Strength, with all of its wounds remaining and any [ONE SHOT] weapons those models are equipped with considered as not having been shot.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

Enhancements.Name: The Hero Returned
Enhancements.Description: Genestealer Cults Infantry model only. Improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in the bearer’s unit by 1.

Enhancements.Name: Firepoint Commander
Enhancements.Description: Genestealer Cults Infantry model only. Each time you target the bearer’s unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+.

Enhancements.Name: Adaptive Reprisal
Enhancements.Description: Genestealer Cults Infantry model only. When you target this unit with the Heroic Intervention stratagem, that use is -1 CP.

Enhancements.Name: Martial Espionage
Enhancements.Description: Genestealer Cults Infantry model only. Once per turn, when a friendly Astra Militarum Infantry or Astra Militarum Mounted unit within 9" of the bearer is selected to shoot, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

Rule.Title: Hypermorphic Fury
Rule.Text: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for Aberrants, Biophagus and Purestrain Genestealers units from your army. In addition, each time such a unit is selected to fight, if it made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

Stratagems.Name: Saintly Paroxysm
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a Genestealer Cults Character model from your army.
Stratagems.Target: That destroyed Character model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. If that Character model is an Abominant or Patriarch, that enemy unit suffers 2D3 mortal wounds instead.

Stratagems.Name: Gene-twisted Muscle
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Aberrants, Biophagus or Purestrain Genestealers unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Hyper-metabolic Vigour
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Aberrants, Biophagus or Purestrain Genestealers unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3". In addition, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends it as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

Stratagems.Name: Evasive Vanguard
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after an enemy unit ends a move within 9" of one or more of your Cult Ambush markers, before removing those markers from the battlefield.
Stratagems.Target: Select one of those Cult Ambush markers.
Stratagems.Effect: You can set up that Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.

Stratagems.Name: Stimulated Bio-surge
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Aberrants, Biophagus or Purestrain Genestealers unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit has +2 to charge rolls.

Stratagems.Name: Bio-horror Revelation
Stratagems.When: Start of your opponent’s Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Aberrants, Biophagus or Purestrain Genestealers unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit within 9" of your unit is selected to shoot, it must take a Leadership test, subtracting 1 from the result. If that test is failed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack that targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Enhancements.Name: Predatory Instincts
Enhancements.Description:
Abominant, Biophagus or Patriarch model only.
▪ Models in the bearer's unit have the Infiltrators ability.
▪ You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention stratagem, regardless of any other uses of that stratagem this phase. If you do:
□ That use is -1 CP.
□ That use does not prevent any uses of that stratagem on other units this phase.

Enhancements.Name: Mutagenic Regeneration
Enhancements.Description: Abominant, Biophagus or Patriarch model only. In each Command phase, one model in the bearer’s unit regains 1 lost wound.

Enhancements.Name: Biomorph Adaptation
Enhancements.Description: Abominant or Patriarch model only. Improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

Enhancements.Name: Alien Majesty
Enhancements.Description: Abominant, Biophagus or Patriarch model only. While an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit (to a minimum of 1).

Rule.Title: PSIONIC PARASITISM
Rule.Text:
At the end of your Movement phase, for each Tyranids Synapse unit from your army, you can select one friendly Genestealer Cults unit (excluding Purestrain Genestealer and Patriarch units) and one friendly Tyranids unit each within 9" of and visible to that Synapse unit. If you do, that Genestealer Cults unit from your army suffers D3+1 mortal wounds and one model in the selected Tyranids unit regains up to that many lost wounds and until the start of your next Movement phase, each time a model in the selected Tyranids unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Tyranids units from your army have the following ability:

Catalyst (Aura): While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a friendly Genestealer Cults unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

THE STAR CHILDREN’S BLESSINGS
You can include Tyranids Vanguard Invader units (excluding Aircraft, Broodlord and Genestealers units) in your army. The combined points cost of such units depends on your battle size: 
	▪ Incursion - Up to 500 pts 
	▪ Strike Force - Up to 1000 pts 
	▪ Onslaught - Up to 1500 pts

No Tyranids models from your army can be your Warlord.

Stratagems.Name: Hyperferocity
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Genestealer Cults unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If one or more friendly Tyranids units are within 6" of that enemy unit, you can re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

Stratagems.Name: Psi Surge
Stratagems.When: Start of any phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Tyranids unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, increase the range of your unit’s Catalyst ability by 3".
Stratagems.Restrictions: Each time you use this Stratagem, until the end of your next Command phase, you cannot use this Stratagem again.

Stratagems.Name: Avenge The Star Children
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
Stratagems.Target: One Tyranids Character unit from your army that was destroyed by that enemy unit this phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a Genestealer Cults model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Divine Imperative
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Genestealer Cults unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more Tyranids units from your army. Until the end of the phase, each time your Genestealer Cults unit declares a charge, if that enemy unit is one of the targets of that charge, add 1 to Charge rolls made for your unit and you can re‑roll the Charge roll.

Stratagems.Name: Darting Attacks
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Tyranids unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Stratagems.Name: Resistance Tunnels
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Genestealer Cults or Tyranids unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Synaptic Auger
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids model only. Each time the bearer would regain one or more lost wounds from the Psionic Parasitism Detachment rule, it regains up to twice that number of lost wounds instead.

Enhancements.Name: Enraptured Damnation
Enhancements.Description: Genestealer Cults model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

Enhancements.Name: Vanguard Tyrant
Enhancements.Description: Winged Hive Tyrant model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

Enhancements.Name: Inhuman Integration
Enhancements.Description: Genestealer Cults model only. Weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability while targeting an enemy unit within 6" of one or more friendly Tyranids units.

ArmyRules.Title: CULT AMBUSH
ArmyRules.Text:
If your Army Faction is Genestealer Cults, you start the battle with a number of Resurgence points, depending on the battle size, as shown below.

▪ Incursion: 6 Resurgence points
▪ Strike Force: 10 Resurgence points
▪ Onslaught: 14 Resurgence points

Each time a unit from your army is destroyed, if every model in that unit has this ability, you can spend the relevant number of Resurgence points shown below based on that unit’s Starting Strength.

Aberrants
5 models: 4 Resurgence points
10 models: 8 Resurgence points

Acolyte Hybrids with Autopistols, Acolyte Hybrids with Hand Flamers, Hybrid Metamorphs
5 models: 2 Resurgence points
10 models: 4 Resurgence points

Atalan Jackals
5 models: 2 Resurgence points
10 models: 6 Resurgence points

Neophyte Hybrids
10 models: 3 Resurgence points
20 models: 6 Resurgence points

Purestrain Genestealers
5 models: 2 Resurgence points
10 models: 6 Resurgence points

If you do:
▪ Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Cult Ambush, at its Starting Strength, with all of its wounds remaining and any [ONE SHOT] weapons those models are equipped with considered as not having been shot.
▪ Place one Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units (if this is not possible, no marker is placed).

UNITS IN CULT AMBUSH
Cult Ambush is a type of Strategic Reserves. Units in Cult Ambush cannot be targeted with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem, but can be set up on the battlefield using a Cult Ambush marker as described below, or by following the rules for Strategic Reserves in a subsequent turn. Units in Cult Ambush are not automatically destroyed at the end of the third battle round.

CULT AMBUSH MARKERS
Use a circular 32mm diameter marker for Cult Ambush markers. If an enemy model (excluding Aircraft) ends any kind of move within 8" of a Cult Ambush marker you placed, that Cult Ambush marker is removed from the battlefield. At the end of your opponent’s next Movement phase, for each of your Cult Ambush markers still on the battlefield, you can select one unit from your army that is in Cult Ambush to make an ingress move. For that ingress move, set that unit up with at least one model in that unit in base contact with that Cult Ambush marker and all other models placed wholly within 3" of that Cult Ambush marker (that Cult Ambush marker is then removed from the battlefield). Units in Cult Ambush can make an ingress move in the first battle round using this rule.
